_publications._publicationTitle: A clinically and genomically annotated nerve sheath tumor biospecimen repository

details: JH-2-002 established as an NF1-associated MPNST patient-derived xenograft in the Johns Hopkins NF1 biospecimen repository; patient NF1 diagnosis age <5 years, plexiform neurofibromas present, positive family history of NF1; clinically and genomically characterized
